commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /home/ec2-user/platform && git fetch --quiet && git reset --hard origin/master 2>&1 | tail -2 && mkdir -p /tmp/audit-out && python3.11 scripts/amt/audit-rate-limit-confound.py --data-dir data/stage3-llama --log-file data/stage3-llama/stage3.log --label "Stage 3 Llama (in-flight)" --out /tmp/audit-out/rate-limit-llama.md && echo --- && cat /tmp/audit-out/rate-limit-llama.md'
